lineage.Process: TableToTable USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data.csv "C:\Users\jwelty\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\Wildland Fire 2021 Pub\Wildland Fire 2021 Pub.gdb" USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data # "OBJECTID "OBJECTID" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data.csv,OBJECTID,-1,-1;USGS_Assigned_ID "USGS_Assigned_ID" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data.csv,USGS_Assigned_ID,-1,-1;Assigned_Fire_Type "Assigned_Fire_Type" true true false 8000 Text 0 0,First,#,USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data.csv,Assigned_Fire_Type,0,8000;Fire_Year "Fire_Year" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data.csv,Fire_Year,-1,-1;Acres_Overlap "Acres_Overlap" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data.csv,Acres_Overlap,-1,-1;Percent_Overlap "Percent_Overlap" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data.csv,Percent_Overlap,-1,-1;Overlapping_USGS_Assigned_ID "Overlapping_USGS_Assigned_ID" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data.csv,Overlapping_USGS_Assigned_ID,-1,-1;Overlapping_Assigned_Fire_Type "Overlapping_Assigned_Fire_Type" true true false 8000 Text 0 0,First,#,USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data.csv,Overlapping_Assigned_Fire_Type,0,8000;Overlapping_Fire_Year "Overlapping_Fire_Year" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data.csv,Overlapping_Fire_Year,-1,-1;Years_Before_or_After_Fire "Years_Before_or_After_Fire" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data.csv,Years_Before_or_After_Fire,-1,-1" #

Sort USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data "S:\Shared Storage\Projects\Fire_Frequency_in_GB\Fires_Through_2020\Publication_Data\Review_Draft_20211019\Fire Feature Data\Fire_Feature_Data.gdb\USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data" "Fire_Year ASCENDING;Overlapping_Fire_Year ASCENDING" "Upper right"

ExportTable USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data "C:\Users\lossanna\OneDrive - New Mexico State University\Documents\04_LDC-LTDL\LDC-LTDL_v04\data\GIS-exports\004_Overlapping-fires-table_export.csv" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "USGS_Assigned_ID "USGS_Assigned_ID" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data,USGS_Assigned_ID,-1,-1;Assigned_Fire_Type "Assigned_Fire_Type" true true false 8000 Text 0 0,First,#,USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data,Assigned_Fire_Type,0,7999;Fire_Year "Fire_Year" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data,Fire_Year,-1,-1;Acres_Overlap "Acres_Overlap" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data,Acres_Overlap,-1,-1;Percent_Overlap "Percent_Overlap" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data,Percent_Overlap,-1,-1;Overlapping_USGS_Assigned_ID "Overlapping_USGS_Assigned_ID" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data,Overlapping_USGS_Assigned_ID,-1,-1;Overlapping_Assigned_Fire_Type "Overlapping_Assigned_Fire_Type" true true false 8000 Text 0 0,First,#,USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data,Overlapping_Assigned_Fire_Type,0,7999;Overlapping_Fire_Year "Overlapping_Fire_Year" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data,Overlapping_Fire_Year,-1,-1;Years_Before_or_After_Fire "Years_Before_or_After_Fire" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,USGS_Wildland_Fires_Overlapping_Fire_Data,Years_Before_or_After_Fire,-1,-1" #
